title: Mekkon
description: Tech mod that adds mechanisms and automation tools for manufacturing factories
body:
This mod introduces new technology and automation features to Minecraft, particularly in versions 1.19 and beyond, where the Gekolib library is required for its functionality.

**This is how energy works**
![Energy connection](https://media.giphy.com/media/teqQZRTAEMcA1SvNcE/giphy.gif)

The main objective of this mod is to enhance the automation aspect of the game. It enables players to create their own factories, generate various resources, excavate large underground caves using drills, and utilize vanilla blocks to build custom factories with conveyor systems.

To set up your factory, you will need to follow these steps:

- Place a factory block and either a factory furnace or compressor on it.
- Check the recipe in the factory and choose one.
- Connect an energy source to the factory block to power the production process.
- Place the necessary materials in the factory to start the manufacturing process.

For greater automation, you can use hoppers and conveyor belts to transport items within the factory and connect different factories to make some complex items.

**Simple factory of copper plates**
![Simple factory of copper plates](https://media.giphy.com/media/3Deax9fpezQoW6XEhx/giphy.gif)

This mod essentially provides players with the tools and mechanics to create complex automated systems in their Minecraft worlds, making resource gathering and processing more efficient and convenient.

**Missile system**
![Missile system](https://media.giphy.com/media/dkG2n4QHmquHBt4rVT/giphy.gif)

**Drill**
![Drill work](https://i.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExZzVqZWlwMnc4bzFlY3N1Yms0NHp6NG1hbjgzcXg5azNrZHo1cjBkcCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/dOwzdVBlhO3o80SfZS/giphy-downsized-large.gif)

**Vertical drill**
![Vertical drill work](https://media.giphy.com/media/LvZH87mQjl8G3Qgurc/giphy.gif)

**Autotree farm**
![autotree farm work](https://media.giphy.com/media/MwJSVUF8TgkhwXlKFx/giphy.gif)
